scripts.wasm:ensure-rust: which rustup || (unset RUSTUP_VERSION && curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable && . $HOME/.cargo/env && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown)
scripts.build:cf: npm run wasm:ensure-rust && . $HOME/.cargo/env 2>/dev/null; npm run wasm:install && npm run wasm:build && astro build
